title: KPop Demon Hunters Directors on Their Oscars Journey
text: Directors Maggie Kang and Chris Appelhans are bringing their entire crew to the Academy Awards to celebrate KPop Demon Hunters, Netflix's breakout animated hit released in June 2025. The film earned nominations for best animated feature and best original song. Kang emphasized that animation requires collaboration, stating Animation is such a collaborative process. She expressed deep gratitude toward her crew, noting Every time I think about the crew, I just burst into tears, highlighting the sacrifices everyone made during the film's seven-year development. The directors secured extra tickets specifically to invite crew members, wanting everyone present to celebrate, no matter what happens. When asked about the platform choice, Kang noted the film was greenlit during COVID uncertainty and viewed it as an opportunity to create original content. She acknowledged streaming's advantages for building momentum through word-of-mouth, which proved crucial for the film's success. Regarding the highly anticipated follow-up, Appelhans shared audience sentiment: fans don't want the team rushing production, understanding that level of artistry takes a really long time, especially when pushing creative boundaries.
